sourceNote: Published provider API list rates. Broker-OAuth token streams have no provider-billed dollar amount, so they are priced as the synthetic API-equivalent using this table. Curated and PR-reviewed (hard-cost-caps SPEC §5); never auto-synced from provider APIs. cache_read is the cache-hit read rate; cache_write is the 5-minute-TTL cache-creation rate. reasoning tokens are billed at the output rate and tool-context tokens at the input rate by consumers of this table.

fallback.note: Conservative-high flat rate (Opus-tier) for models not in the table. Over-estimating an unknown model is the fail-safe direction for a spend cap.

claude-sonnet-5.note: standard rate; an introductory $2/$10 per MTok promotion runs through 2026-08-31 — standard is used here so the spend truth source does not under-count once the promotion ends

gpt-5.5.note: estimated; OpenAI bills cache creation as regular input, so cache_write mirrors input
